info.title: Rapidata Payment API
info.description: The API for the Rapidata Payment service

post.summary: Creates a manual charge billing item for a customer.
Creates a rate-card price for an external service.

get.summary: Gets the paged billing groups for the active billing period.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Optional customer ID. Admins can specify any customer; non-admins see their own.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

get.summary: Gets the overview for the active billing period.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Optional customer ID. Admins can specify any customer; non-admins see their own.

get.summary: Gets the paged billing groups for a billing period.

parameters.name: billingPeriodId
parameters.description: The ID of the billing period.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

get.summary: Gets the overview for a billing period by its ID.

parameters.name: billingPeriodId
parameters.description: The ID of the billing period to retrieve.

get.summary: Gets the current-period usage and applicable limit for a customer.
get.description: Defaults to the authenticated customer when no customerId is provided.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The id of the customer to get the billing summary for.

get.summary: Gets the billing cost time series.
Queries billing periods accessible to the current customer.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status.

parameters.name: owner_id
parameters.description: Filter by owner_id.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Filter by start_date.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Filter by end_date.

parameters.name: logic
parameters.description: How to combine the field filters: "and" (default) requires every filter to match, "or" requires any of them to match.

get.summary: Returns billing costs aggregated per customer, ranked by cost.
Returns billing costs aggregated per billing group, ranked by cost.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

get.summary: Returns billing costs aggregated per organization, ranked by cost.
Returns the aggregated status and results of all reconciliation jobs in a bulk operation.

parameters.name: bulkReconciliationId
parameters.description: The correlation identifier returned from the bulk reconcile endpoint.

get.summary: Returns the status and results of a reconciliation job.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the reconciliation job.

post.summary: Redispatches the individual reconciliations contained in the given bulk reconciliation.

parameters.name: bulkReconciliationId
parameters.description: The bulk reconciliation to redispatch.

post.summary: Starts reconciliation for a single billing item, all items for a customer, or all items in a billing group.
post.description:
Exactly one of BillingItemId, CustomerId, or BillingGroupId must be specified.
 Date range filtering is only available with CustomerId or BillingGroupId.
 Returns a correlation ID that can be used to track progress of the bulk operation.

requestBody.description: The reconciliation target and configuration options.

post.summary: Creates a billing setting for a billing item.

parameters.name: billingItemId
parameters.description: The billing item identifier.

post.summary: Creates a billing setting for a customer.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The customer identifier.

delete.summary: Deletes a billing item billing setting.

parameters.name: billingItemId
parameters.description: The billing item identifier.

parameters.name: settingId
parameters.description: The billing setting identifier.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The customer identifier.

parameters.name: settingId
parameters.description: The billing setting identifier.

parameters.name: settingId
parameters.description: The billing setting identifier.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Optional customer identifier to scope the timeline.

parameters.name: billingItemId
parameters.description: Optional billing item identifier to scope the timeline.

post.summary: Creates a volume discount bracket for a billing period.

parameters.name: billingPeriodId
parameters.description: The billing period to add the volume discount to.

get.summary: Gets all volume discount brackets for a billing period.

parameters.name: billingPeriodId
parameters.description: The billing period to get volume discounts for.

post.summary: Grants a voucher to a customer.
post.description:
Provide exactly one of validity (a duration from now) or expiresAt (an
 explicit instant) — not both, not neither. The grant immediately raises the customer's
 serve allowance.

requestBody.description: The customer, voucher amount, and expiry.

get.summary: Queries vouchers with filtering, sorting, and pagination.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: Filter by customer_id.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filter by source.

parameters.name: expires_at
parameters.description: Filter by expires_at.

parameters.name: issued_at
parameters.description: Filter by issued_at.

parameters.name: logic
parameters.description: How to combine the field filters: "and" (default) requires every filter to match, "or" requires any of them to match.

post.description: Lowers the owning customer's serve allowance by the voucher's remaining grant.

parameters.name: voucherId
parameters.description: The id of the voucher to revoke.

put.summary: Sets the spend limit for a customer.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The id of the customer whose credit line to set.

put.summary: Sets the minimum spend commitment for a customer.
put.description:
At invoice time, if the period's measured spend is below the commitment, a top-up charge for
 the shortfall is added so the usage-side bill reaches the commitment. Setting it to 0
 removes the commitment.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The id of the customer whose minimum spend commitment to set.

put.summary: Sets the platform fee for a customer.
put.description:
The fee is automatically applied as a charge to the customer's current open billing period
 and to every future period. Setting it to null removes the platform-fee charge from
 the current open period; 0 keeps an explicit $0 charge that is still shown.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The id of the customer whose platform fee to set.

post.summary: Creates a Stripe draft invoice for a billing period.

parameters.name: invoiceId
parameters.description: The invoice to finalize.

parameters.name: invoiceId
parameters.description: The invoice ID.

get.summary: Queries invoices with filtering, sorting, and pagination.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status.

parameters.name: owner_id
parameters.description: Filter by owner_id.

parameters.name: billing_period_id
parameters.description: Filter by billing_period_id.

parameters.name: created_at
parameters.description: Filter by created_at.

parameters.name: logic
parameters.description: How to combine the field filters: "and" (default) requires every filter to match, "or" requires any of them to match.

parameters.name: invoiceId
parameters.description: The invoice to void.

post.summary: Creates a new Stripe checkout session for the given price.

parameters.name: priceId
parameters.description: The Stripe price id to check out.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: The mode in which the payment should be done.

post.summary:
Creates a hosted checkout session for the authenticated customer to add the given amount to
 their prepaid balance.
post.description:
Rejected for non-prepaid customers and for amounts below the configured minimum. On
 successful payment a voucher for the amount is minted, which raises the customer's balance.

requestBody.description: The amount in dollars to add to the balance.

get.summary: Gets the current status of a checkout session.
get.description: Used to check whether the payment was successful or is still pending.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The id of the checkout session to get the status for.

post.summary: Processes an incoming Stripe webhook event.
post.description:
Reads the raw request body and the Stripe-Signature header, then dispatches a
 ProcessPaymentEventCommand.

priority.description: The priority of the setting. Defaults to the configured billing item default if not specified.

validFrom.description: The start of the validity window.

costPerResponseContextVideoMinimum.description: The minimum cost per context video.

customerId.description: Null for the global default; set to scope the price to one customer.

unitPrice.description: Price per unit (per image / per shortening).

priority.description: Priority; defaults to the configured global/customer default if unset.

validFrom.description: The start of the validity window.

validTo.description: The end of the validity window.

priority.description: The priority of the setting. Defaults to the configured global default if not specified.

validFrom.description: The start of the validity window.

validTo.description: The end of the validity window.

costPerResponseFreeText.description: The cost per free text response.

costPerResponseMediaPerSecond.description: The cost per second of media response.

costPerResponseMediaMinimum.description: The minimum cost per media response.

costPerResponseTextPer50Chars.description: The cost per 50 characters of text response.

billingPeriodId.description: The billing period to create an invoice for.

name.description: The name of the manual charge.

billingPeriodId.description: The billing period to add the charge to.

amount.description: The charge amount. Positive for fees, negative for refunds.

reason.description: The reason for the manual charge.

comment.description: An optional comment describing the charge.

id.description: The ID of the created billing item.

amount.description: The amount in dollars to add to the prepaid balance.

url.description: The hosted Stripe checkout url to redirect the customer to.

minResponses.description: The minimum number of responses to trigger this discount bracket.

discountRatio.description: The discount ratio for this bracket (e.g., 0.10 for 10%).

id.description: The ID of the created volume discount bracket.

startDate.description: The start date of the billing period.

endDate.description: The end date of the billing period.

status.description: The status of the billing period.

totalGrossCost.description: The total gross cost before discounts.

totalNetCost.description: The total net cost after discounts.

totalResponseCount.description: The total number of billable responses.

lineItems.description: The line items (running cost, platform fees, refunds, volume discounts).

startDate.description: The start date of the billing period.

endDate.description: The end date of the billing period.

status.description: The status of the billing period.

totalGrossCost.description: The total gross cost before discounts.

totalNetCost.description: The total net cost after discounts.

totalResponseCount.description: The total number of billable responses.

lineItems.description: The line items (running cost, platform fees, refunds, volume discounts).

mode.description: How the billing summary should be presented (usage, limited, or prepaid).

currentPeriodUsage.description: The accumulated billable spend in the current billing period.

effectiveLimit.description: The spending cap for the current period, or null when unlimited.

availableAmount.description: The remaining prepaid balance, set only for prepaid customers.

minimumSpendCommitment.description: Dollars the customer has committed to spend per billing period; 0 means no commitment.

bulkReconciliationId.description: The bulk reconciliation identifier for the bulk operation.

correlationId.description: The correlation identifier for the bulk operation.

dispatchState.description: The current dispatch state (Dispatching, Completed, Failed).

expectedTotal.description: The expected total number of billing items to dispatch.

dispatchCompletedAt.description: The timestamp when dispatching finished. Null if still dispatching.

totalJobs.description: The total number of reconciliation jobs in this bulk operation.

pendingJobs.description: The number of jobs in Pending state.

runningJobs.description: The number of jobs in Running state.

completedJobs.description: The number of jobs in Completed state.

failedJobs.description: The number of jobs in Failed state.

rapidsProcessed.description: The total number of rapids processed across all jobs.

rapidsUpdated.description: The total number of rapids updated across all jobs.

rapidsAlreadyCorrect.description: The total number of rapids already correct across all jobs.

rapidsFailed.description: The total number of rapids that failed across all jobs.

responsesProcessed.description: The total number of responses processed across all jobs.

correctionsCreated.description: The total number of corrections created across all jobs.

responsesAlreadyCorrect.description: The total number of responses already correct across all jobs.

responsesFailed.description: The total number of responses that failed across all jobs.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the bulk operation was created.

completedAt.description: The timestamp when all jobs completed. Null if not fully complete.

status.description: The current status of the checkout session.

totalGrossCost.description: The total gross cost across all data points.

totalDiscount.description: The total discount across all data points.

totalNetCost.description: The total net cost across all data points.

GetCostTimeSeriesEndpoint_Output.description: The output for the cost time series endpoint.

billingPeriodId.description: The billing period this invoice belongs to.

billingPeriodStart.description: The start date of the billing period.

billingPeriodEnd.description: The end date of the billing period.

amountDue.description: The total amount due in cents.

jobId.description: The unique identifier of the reconciliation job.

billingId.description: The billing item identifier this job reconciles.

bulkReconciliationId.description: The bulk reconciliation identifier if this job was created as part of a bulk operation.

correlationId.description: The correlation identifier if this job was created as part of a bulk operation.

state.description: The current state of the reconciliation job.

timestampMode.description: The timestamp mode used for correction entries.

rapidsProcessed.description: The total number of rapids processed.

rapidsUpdated.description: The number of rapids that were updated.

rapidsAlreadyCorrect.description: The number of rapids that were already correct.

rapidsFailed.description: The number of rapids that failed during reconciliation.

responsesProcessed.description: The total number of responses processed.

correctionsCreated.description: The number of correction entries created.

responsesAlreadyCorrect.description: The number of responses that were already correct.

responsesFailed.description: The number of responses that failed during reconciliation.

errorMessage.description: The error message if the job failed.

completedAt.description: The timestamp when the job completed.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the job was created.

createdById.description: The identifier of the user who created the job.

createdByMail.description: The email of the user who created the job.

customerId.description: The id of the customer to grant the voucher to.

amount.description: The face value of the voucher in dollars.

validity.description:
How long the voucher stays valid, counted from now. Serialized as a duration string in
 the format [days.]hh:mm:ss (the days part is optional): "30.00:00:00" = 30
 days, "7.00:00:00" = 7 days, "12:00:00" = 12 hours. Must be positive.
 Provide this or expiresAt, not both.

expiresAt.description:
An explicit expiry instant as an ISO-8601 timestamp (e.g. "2026-12-31T23:59:59Z").
 Use this instead of validity when you know the exact date the
 voucher should expire. Provide this or validity, not both.

voucherId.description: The id of the granted voucher.

IBillingGroupModel.description:
A billable group of responses on a billing period, identified by a discriminator.
 Implementations describe the source of the charges (order, benchmark, audience job, etc.).

id.description: The unique identifier of the billing group.

name.description: A human-readable name for the billing group.

grossCost.description: The gross cost of the responses in this group, before any discount.

discount.description: The absolute discount applied to the gross cost.

netCost.description: The net cost of the responses in this group after discount.

responseCount.description: The number of responses attributed to this billing group.

audienceId.description: The identifier of the audience the distillation run was executed for.

IBillingGroupModelAudienceDistillationBi.description: A billing group for responses produced by an audience distillation run.

ownerId.description: The customer ID of the billing period owner.

startDate.description: The start date of the billing period.

endDate.description: The end date of the billing period.

status.description: The status of the billing period.

QueryCostsByCustomerEndpoint_Output.description: Billing cost data aggregated per customer.

grossCost.description: The gross cost for this organization (before discount).

netCost.description: The net cost for this organization (after discount).

responseCount.description: The total number of responses for this organization.

QueryCostsByOrganizationEndpoint_Output.description: Billing cost data aggregated per organization.

billingPeriodId.description: The billing period this invoice belongs to.

billingPeriodStart.description: The start date of the billing period.

billingPeriodEnd.description: The end date of the billing period.

amountDue.description: The total amount due in cents.

amount.description: The face value of the voucher in dollars.

used.description: The amount already consumed across closed billing periods.

remaining.description: The remaining free usage the voucher can still grant.

creditLine.description:
The new credit line. null means no limit (unlimited), 0 disables all traffic,
 and a positive value caps spend at that amount.

minimumSpendCommitment.description:
The new minimum spend commitment. 0 means no commitment; a positive value tops up
 the usage-side bill at invoice time when measured spend falls short.

platformFee.description:
The new platform fee. null removes the platform fee; 0 is an explicit $0
 fee that is still shown; a positive value is charged once per billing period.

billingItemId.description: The identifier of a single billing item to reconcile.

customerId.description: The customer identifier to reconcile all billing items for.

billingGroupId.description: The billing group identifier to reconcile all billing items for.

startDate.description: Optional start date filter. Only applies with CustomerId or BillingGroupId.

endDate.description: Optional end date filter. Only applies with CustomerId or BillingGroupId.

timestampMode.description: Controls the timestamp used for correction entries.

bulkReconciliationId.description: The bulk reconciliation identifier for all jobs created in this bulk operation.

correlationId.description: The correlation identifier for all jobs created in this bulk operation.
